dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires 13-week high detection. Mapped to Donchian upper band (dc_upper) as best available proxy for new highs over an extended lookback period. Volume condition uses vol_ratio_20 (volume ratio to 20-day average). Confirmation bars set to 0 per signal. Exit uses sma_20 crossbelow and 3% stop loss. Note: A true 13-week lookback may require custom indicator if dc_upper does not align with exact 13-week period.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal requires 13-week high detection. Mapped to Donchian upper band (dc_upper) as best available proxy for new highs over an extended lookback period. Volume condition uses vol_ratio_20 (volume ratio to 20-day average). Confirmation bars set to 0 per signal. Exit uses sma_20 crossbelow and 3% stop loss. Note: A true 13-week lookback may require custom indicator if dc_upper does not align with exact 13-week period.

source_rule_text: Buy stocks when they reach new highs, not when they are near their lows or consolidation levels, as this correlates with superior market performance.
